title: Topdown Delta Analysis [Mr. Quant]
author: Jacob_LuxAlgo
summary_bullets: The Core Calculation: Delta The foundation of the entire indicator is the Delta calculation.
It measures the volume relative to the bar's direction: Formula: Volume * (Close >= Open ?
If a bar closes higher than it opened, the volume is considered "Bullish Delta" (Green).
If a bar closes lower, it is "Bearish Delta" (Red).
Current TF Labels: These appear below every candle on your active chart, formatted in thousands (k) for readability (e.g., 12.5k).* 2.
